scripts.dev:prod: bash -c '[ -f .env.development.local ] && mv .env.development.local .env.development.local.bak; trap "[ -f .env.development.local.bak ] && mv .env.development.local.bak .env.development.local" EXIT; next dev'
scripts.dev:staging: bash -c 'if [ ! -f .env.staging.local ]; then echo "missing .env.staging.local (create it with NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY for staging)"; exit 1; fi; [ -f .env.development.local ] && mv .env.development.local .env.development.local.bak; cp .env.staging.local .env.development.local; trap "rm -f .env.development.local; [ -f .env.development.local.bak ] && mv .env.development.local.bak .env.development.local" EXIT; next dev'
